signals.signal_title: Weatherford acquires Datagration (PetroVisor/EcoVisor) Q3 2024 — AI production optimization
signals.signal_description: Weatherford acquired Datagration Solutions in Q3 2024, adding the PetroVisor AI-enabled production optimization platform and EcoVisor ESG analytics to its Digital Solutions segment. CEO Girish Saligram has named digitalization as a core strategic differentiator. Creates active post-acquisition IT integration demand.

signals.signal_title: Weatherford 8-year real-time digital wellsite monitoring contract with Romgaz
signals.signal_description: Weatherford secured an 8-year contract with Romanian gas producer Romgaz in 2025 for real-time digital wellsite monitoring, deploying its Digital Solutions capabilities. Confirms commercial AI and digital deployment at scale.

spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: Datagration acquisition (PetroVisor AI/EcoVisor) is a strong signal — dedicated AI platform for production optimization now part of product portfolio. CEO publicly drives digitalization. Digital Solutions is a standalone segment — dedicated investment. 8-year Romgaz digital contract confirms commercial AI deployment. Score 12 — approaching threshold but below ≥15.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Houston TX — within WWT STOLA territory. No channel conflict.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue ~$5.4B. ~17,000 employees globally. Revenue below $10B — no OEM deduction. Houston HQ in STOLA. Datagration acquisition Q3 2024 = significant digital/AI signal. Digital Solutions standalone segment. CEO digitalization mandate. No MSP or CoE identified. Confidence MEDIUM. WWT opportunity: Houston account, no MSP, active digital transformation, AI platform integration demand post-Datagration.
